purpose: Extreme close-up of Saudi woman's eyes/partial face showing glow makeup.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial beauty close-up of Saudi woman with luminous gold-toned glow makeup catching warm light, frame focused on eyes and partial face from forehead to lips only (modest framing), modest hijab visible at edges of frame, real visible skin texture with natural pores and subtle imperfections, luminous highlighter on cheekbones, natural lip color, contemplative expression with slight lowered gaze, soft directional warm light from upper right, shot on 100mm macro at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: immodest framing below chin
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T36. Saudi adaptation guidance: Hijab visible at frame edges essential for modest compliance. Face_visibility_permission governs rendering or partial framing. Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month. Compliance level: elevated.
